<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get an approval request by ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/approvals/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the full approval request record including current status and decision details.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
